svg.text: Governance-First Design | SOX-Compliant | Segregation of Duties | Human-in-the-Loop

g.text: Every decision logged | Every agent | Every override
Trial Balance | Account Balance | Control Accounts | Budget Variance | Journal Entries
Semantic Search | Accounting Policies | SOX Guide | Close Procedures

svg.text: Governance Engine sits between agent layers. Every entry, reconciliation, and variance passes through policy enforcement before proceeding.
